openFindings.title: Parent description.json description overwritten to describe remediation instead of phase parent purpose

adjudication.claim: description field describes remediation, not phase parent purpose
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Parent's most recent context WAS remediation; generate-context.js captured it honestly. But description should reflect parent identity, not most recent action.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: generate-context.js extracts from most recent context; upstream convention issue.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Re-run generate-context.js with parent spec.md context or manually patch.

openFindings.title: Malformed PHASE DOCUMENTATION MAP row in parent spec.md (also tracked as P2-007-002)

adjudication.claim: Row has no phase number, remediation packet instead of child folder, TBD fields
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Could be intentional placeholder; format doesn't match table header.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Batch A artifact that was never cleaned up.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Delete or correct row 3 of table.

openFindings.title: 002 handover.md completion_pct drifts from IMS (70 vs 95) — remediation refreshed IMS but left handover stale

adjudication.claim: completion_pct:70 in handover vs 95 in IMS
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: Could handover reflect different metric? Same continuity schema as IMS.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: Handover authored pre-remediation; remediation targeted IMS not handover (by design).

openFindings.title: 001 child lacks handover.md — sibling 002 has one for resumption continuity

evidenceRefs: Glob of 001-initial-doctor-commands/ returns 24 files, no handover.md
adjudication.counterevidenceSought: handover.md is optional cross-cutting doc; IMS continuity block serves same purpose.
adjudication.alternativeExplanation: 001 authored before convention; IMS frontmatter is sufficient continuity ladder.
adjudication.downgradeTrigger: Not urgent — create handover.md if parity desired.

deferredFindings.title: Gemini runtime doctor commands use inconsistent .toml format vs .md
deferredFindings.rationale: .toml is correct Gemini convention (pre-existing mcp_debug.toml + mcp_install.toml). Batch C completed mirror in TOML. Finding framing was wrong.

deferredFindings.title: Small doc-code drift in parent handover.md
deferredFindings.rationale: Parent handover.md not in Batch D scope to keep batches surgical. Minor drift — does not block.

deferredFindings.resolution: non-issue — gemini TOML is correct convention
deferred — parent handover.md outside Batch D scope
